slides.headline: Onboarding gets lost in the chase.
slides.subtext: Forms, forwarded emails, and reminder notes make it hard to tell who is ready.

slides.headline: One queue. Fewer blind spots.
slides.subtext: Applications and onboarding steps stay visible together instead of splitting across inboxes.

slides.headline: Pending docs become visible.
slides.subtext: When a case is missing a credential, the next action is easier to spot.

slides.headline: Compliant. Expiring. Overdue.
slides.subtext: Live status makes it easier to see who is ready now and who still needs action.

slides.headline: Keep onboarding status visible.
slides.subtext: Request a demo if your clinic wants one place for onboarding follow-up.
